prompt:
Create a Python script called custom_metadata.py that uses the pxr library to demonstrate USD's extensibility features. The script must create a file called pipeline.usda containing:

1. Default prim /Project
2. /Project has custom metadata via SetCustomDataByKey: "pipeline:version" = "2.1", "pipeline:department" = "lighting"
3. /Project has assetInfo with name="hero_asset" and identifier="assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
4. /Project/Hero — an Xform with purpose set to "render" (UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
5. /Project/Hero/Proxy — an Xform with purpose set to "proxy" (UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
6. /Project/Hero/Guide — an Xform with purpose set to "guide" (UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
7. /Project/Hero has custom properties:
   - "custom:shotName" as a string property with value "SH010"
   - "custom:frameRange" as a Int2 property with value (1001, 1100)
8. /Project/Hero should have UsdGeom.ModelAPI applied with kind set to "component"

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")

guide_xform = UsdGeom.Xform(guide_prim)
guide_xform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)

stage.GetRootLayer().Save()
print("Created pipeline.usda successfully")

files.content:
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")

stage.SetDefaultPrim(stage.DefinePrim("/Project", "Xform"))

project_prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath("/Project")
project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")

model_api = Usd.ModelAPI(project_prim)
model_api.SetAssetInfo(
    {"name": "hero_asset", "identifier": "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"}
)

hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero", "Xform")
hero_xform = UsdGeom.Xform(hero_prim)
hero_xform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)

hero_model_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
Usd.ModelAPI(hero_prim).SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)

shot_name_prop = hero_prim.CreateAttribute("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String)
shot_name_prop.Set("SH010")

frame_range_prop = hero_prim.CreateAttribute(
    "custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2
)
frame_range_prop.Set(Gf.Vec2i(1001, 1100))

proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy", "Xform")
proxy_xform = UsdGeom.Xform(proxy_prim)
proxy_xform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)

guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide", "Xform")
guide_xform = UsdGeom.Xform(guide_prim)
guide_xform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)

stage.GetRootLayer().Save()
print("Created pipeline.usda successfully")
